replay_gate.definition: exact natural R-004b wrong-instance prefix through ? must recover original natural Yes preference before candidate counterfactual interpretation

conclusion: No candidate-binding conclusion. Exact-prefix replay recovered Yes on only 1/7 cases although R-004b natural outputs were Yes on 7/7. Counterfactual target/wrong margins are not scientifically interpretable until model/environment/context replay is reconciled.
likely_audit_targets: R-004b versus current transformers/model loading environment
chat-template/message equality at token and pixel-value level
generation-time decision tokenization versus post-hoc teacher-forced scoring
tokenization_correction: Prefix must end at ? and score leading-space tokens: Yes=7414, No=2308. R-005e used 9454/2753 after a literal trailing-space prefix and is invalid independently of its existing assertion failure.
limitations: n7 selected pilot; single reviewer; forced-prefix exposure shift; local split; replay gate failure dominates all metrics
